summary: Russian Shahed and UAV attacks continue over Kyiv, Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv regions, with multiple strikes reported on civilian infrastructure. Ukrainian forces reported heavy aerial activity in the Black Sea and attacks on Russian‑occupied Crimea, including a power plant strike in Kerch. Casualties and damage reports indicate ongoing intense combat across multiple fronts.
key_points: Russian Shahed missiles were detected over Kyiv's Nivki/Sviatoshyn and Obolon/Troeshchyna districts, prompting air defence alerts. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67991)
Ukrainian authorities reported 1,050 Russian attacks on 56 settlements in Zaporizhzhia region, including 18 air strikes and 769 UAV launches in one day. (Source: @UkraineNow/82126)
A Russian tactical aviation strike deployed guided aviation bombs on Zaporizhzhia city and southern Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66048)
Ukrainian forces struck a Russian‑occupied power plant in Kerch, Crimea, causing widespread electricity outages in several districts. (Source: @UkraineNow/82129)
Multiple groups of combat UAVs were observed over the Black Sea heading toward Vylkove (Odesa region) and Odessa city. (Source: @kpszsu/66061)
Russian forces used FAB‑500 bombs against Ukrainian drone control centers in the DPR, according to the Russian Ministry of Defence. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31088)
Three people were injured in Sumy after a Russian air strike that hit three locations, igniting a trolleybus. (Source: @UkraineNow/82127)

sections.executive_summary: Russian Shahed missiles continue to target Kyiv suburbs, while intensive UAV and bomb attacks hit Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv regions. Ukrainian forces have struck a Russian‑occupied power plant in Kerch, causing major outages. Both sides report high‑intensity aerial operations across multiple fronts.

points: Ukrainian defence reported 1,050 attacks by Russian forces on 56 settlements in Zaporizhzhia region, including 18 air strikes, 769 UAV launches, 3 multiple rocket launcher strikes and 260 artillery strikes, causing damage to housing and infrastructure. (Source: @UkraineNow/82126)

Ukrainian forces hit a thermal power plant in the occupied city of Kerch, Crimea, leading to mass electricity outages in Evpatoria, Krasnoperekopsk, Saksky, Dzhankoy and Krasnogvardeysky districts. (Source: @UkraineNow/82129)
Three civilians were injured in Sumy after a Russian air strike that struck three locations and set a trolleybus on fire. (Source: @UkraineNow/82127)
Ukrainian air defence detected Shahed missiles over Kyiv's Nivki/Sviatoshyn and Obolon/Troeshchyna districts, prompting alerts. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67991)
Ukrainian forces reported groups of combat UAVs operating over the Black Sea heading toward Vylkove (Odesa region) and directly over Odessa city. (Source: @kpszsu/66061)
Ukrainian intelligence noted a Russian FAB‑500 bomb strike on drone control centers in the DPR. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31088)
Ukrainian reports indicated a Shahed missile from the north over Kyiv/Vishhorod. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67989)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on Zaporizhzhia city and southern Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66048)
Russian forces deployed Shahed missiles over Kyiv suburbs Nivki/Sviatoshyn, Obolon/Troeshchyna, and a northward Shahed over Kyiv/Vishhorod. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67991, @mon1tor_ua/67989)
Russian UAV groups were observed over the Black Sea heading toward Vylkove (Odesa region) and over Odessa. (Source: @kpszsu/66061)
Russian Ministry of Defence claimed use of FAB‑500 bombs against Ukrainian drone control centers in the DPR. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31088)
Russian forces reported multiple UAV attacks on Ukrainian infrastructure, including a bus in Gorlovka (DNR) resulting in up to 17 injuries. (Source: @tass_agency/382036)
Russian statements indicated intensified strikes on Ukrainian positions in Zaporozhye, Kharkiv and Nikolayev, including “Geranium” attacks. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105)
Russian forces claimed damage to Ukrainian fuel storage facilities in the Zaporozhye region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31083)
Ukrainian reports of 769 UAV launches, including FPV drones, over Zaporizhzhia region, with 18 air strikes and 260 artillery strikes in one day. (Source: @UkraineNow/82126)
Russian tactical aviation bombed Zaporizhzhia city and southern Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66048)
Ukrainian forces reported a Shahed missile from the north over Kyiv, indicating possible eastern‑to‑west trajectories. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67989)
Ukrainian defence noted UAV activity near Magdalenivka in Dnipropetrovsk region, indicating eastern sector pressure. (Source: @kpszsu/66071)
Russian reports of UAV attacks on Sumy, causing civilian injuries and a trolleybus fire. (Source: @UkraineNow/82127)
Ukrainian intelligence observed UAV groups over the Black Sea heading toward Vylkove, affecting the eastern Odesa corridor. (Source: @kpszsu/66061)
Russian forces claimed strikes on Ukrainian fuel storage in Zaporozhye region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31083)
Shahed missiles detected over Kyiv's Nivki/Sviatoshyn and Obolon/Troeshchyna districts, indicating northern approaches to the capital. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67991)
Ukrainian radar reported a reactive Shahed from the north over Kyiv/Vishhorod. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67989)
Ukrainian forces observed UAVs north of Horodnia and Koryukivka in Chernihiv region. (Source: @eRadarrua/97792)
Ukrainian defence noted reactive UAVs over Kyiv water reservoir heading toward Vishhorod/Kyiv. (Source: @kpszsu/66041)
Ukrainian reports of UAVs near Borova, Vasylkiv, Kalynivka, and north of Borova with western courses. (Source: @kpszsu/66037, @kpszsu/66036)
Russian statements mention increased UAV activity over northern Ukrainian territories, though specific locations were not detailed. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105)
Ukrainian intelligence reported a Shahed launch from the north targeting Kyiv, prompting air defence activation. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67989)
Ukrainian forces reported multiple UAV groups over the Black Sea heading toward Vylkove (Odesa region) and Odessa city. (Source: @kpszsu/66061)
Russian tactical aviation bombed Zaporizhzhia city and southern Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66048)
Ukrainian OVA reported a Russian drone attack on the Odesa coastline, killing a 26‑year‑old woman and injuring a 39‑year‑old man. (Source: @UkraineNow/82132)
Ukrainian defence noted UAV activity near the southern direction of Kharkiv, passing Zolochiv and Bohodukhiv. (Source: @kpszsu/66073)
Ukrainian reports of UAVs over the Black Sea heading toward the port city of Odessa. (Source: @kpszsu/66064)
Russian forces claimed strikes on Ukrainian fuel storage in the Zaporozhye region, affecting southern logistics. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31083)
Ukrainian authorities reported a Shahed missile over Kyiv from the north, but also noted UAVs operating south of Zaporizhzhia. (Source: @kpszsu/66060)
Russian tactical aviation deployed guided aviation bombs on Zaporizhzhia and southern Kharkiv, indicating intensified air strikes. (Source: @kpszsu/66048)
Ukrainian reports of 769 UAV launches, 18 air strikes and 260 artillery strikes in Zaporizhzhia region within 24 hours. (Source: @UkraineNow/82126)
Russian Ministry of Defence announced FAB‑500 bomb strikes on Ukrainian drone control centers in the DPR. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31088)
Ukrainian air defence detected multiple Shahed missile trajectories over Kyiv suburbs, prompting alerts. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67991)
Ukrainian forces reported UAV groups over the Black Sea heading toward Vylkove and Odessa, suggesting maritime air activity. (Source: @kpszsu/66061)
Russian reports of UAV attacks on civilian targets in Sumy, Gorlovka (DNR) and other locations, causing injuries. (Source: @UkraineNow/82127, @tass_agency/382036)
Russian statements indicated increased drone activity over Ukrainian territory, with claims of 141 enemy drones shot down in a day. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105)

key_developments: Russian Shahed missiles were detected over Kyiv's Nivki/Sviatoshyn and Obolon/Troeshchyna districts, prompting air defence alerts. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67991)
Ukrainian authorities reported 1,050 Russian attacks on 56 settlements in Zaporizhzhia region, including 18 air strikes and 769 UAV launches in one day. (Source: @UkraineNow/82126)
Ukrainian forces struck a Russian‑occupied power plant in Kerch, Crimea, causing widespread electricity outages in multiple districts. (Source: @UkraineNow/82129)
Russian tactical aviation deployed guided aviation bombs on Zaporizhzhia city and southern Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66048)
Multiple groups of combat UAVs were observed over the Black Sea heading toward Vylkove (Odesa region) and Odessa city. (Source: @kpszsu/66061)
Russian Ministry of Defence claimed FAB‑500 bomb strikes on Ukrainian drone control centers in the DPR. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31088)
Three civilians were injured in Sumy after a Russian air strike that hit three locations, igniting a trolleybus. (Source: @UkraineNow/82127)
sections.threat_assessment: Russian aerial capabilities remain robust, with Shahed missiles targeting Kyiv and guided bombs striking key Ukrainian cities. Ukrainian UAV activity over the Black Sea and attacks on occupied Crimea indicate a widening of the conflict's maritime dimension. Continued high‑intensity UAV and artillery operations across multiple fronts suggest sustained pressure on Ukrainian defensive resources.
sections.regional_response: Ukrainian regional authorities have activated air defence alerts in Kyiv and reported extensive damage in Zaporizhzhia and Sumy, while local administrations in Crimea are managing large‑scale power outages. Russian statements emphasize the use of heavy munitions and UAVs to degrade Ukrainian infrastructure, reflecting a coordinated strategic approach across the frontlines.
sections.intelligence_notes: Open‑source monitoring shows a persistent pattern of Shahed missile launches from the north toward the capital and increased UAV concentrations over the Black Sea corridor. The reported FAB‑500 strikes on drone control centers suggest a focus on degrading Ukrainian ISR capabilities. Continued observation of UAV flight paths is critical for anticipating future strikes on both civilian and military targets.
